hero.title: Atina'e o Polokalama Pisinisi
hero.description: Iuga-i-le-iuga pisinisi talosaga ma fa'aonapo nei fa'avae, API-muamua fausaga, ma ao-native scalability.

problem.title: Fa'afitauli Fa'afitauli Fa'apisinisi
problem.subtitle: O fea e leiloa ai le saoasaoa, paketi, ma le fa'atulagaina o fuafuaga

approach.title: Auala Inisinia
approach.subtitle: Fa'afefea ona tatou liliu mana'oga le manino i gaosiga-sauni tulaga

principles.title: Mataupu Faavae o le Fausaga
principles.subtitle: Fa'aiuga fa'aiuga e fa'atumauina ai faiga fa'apisinisi i le fua

technology.title: O la matou tekonolosi fa'aputuga
technology.subtitle: Tekonolosi fa'aonapo nei ma fa'amaonia mo le tu'uina atu o pisinisi

breakdown.title: Solia o le Auaunaga
breakdown.subtitle: O se auala fa'atulagaina mai le mauaina i le tu'uina atu o gaosiga mautu

problem.overview: E masani ona tauaveina e le au pisinisi ni galuega taua i luga o faiga vaevaeina, fausiaina o taimi uumi, fa'amaumauga le ogatasi, ma le taugata o le fa'amaopoopoina o tusi lesona i le va o matagaluega.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: O le a le mea e masani ona matauina e taitai
painPoints: O tautinoga o le kilivaina e se'e ona o le fa'alagolago i 'au e le o fa'atautaia
O le fa'ata'ita'iga o pisinisi autu e fa'aluaina i luga o auala ma oloa
O le tu'ufa'atasia o measina e fa'alauiloa ai foliga fou e maualuga le lamatiaga ma telegese
impactSignals: Roadmap throughput pa'ū ao inisinia tupe fa'aalu fa'ateleina
Tagata fa'atau fa'afeagai fa'aletonu fa'ateleina i le taimi o fa'asa'olotoina
Fa'aiuga fa'aiuga fa'agesegese ona o le le ogatasi o lipoti fa'agaioiga

approach.overview: Matou te fa'atinoina ma le tusiata fale-muamua mauaina, konekarate-tulia kilivaina, ma fa'atonutonuina fa'asa'olotoina inisinia ina ia pisinisi taua e lafoina i fa'ateleina fa'amoemoeina.

pillars.title: Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'iga ma Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'atapula'aina
pillars.detail: Matou te fa'afanua vaega e fa'amama ai tuaoi o auaunaga e fa'aititia ai le feso'ota'iga o le koluse-'au ma fa'amanino le umiaina.

pillars.title: API-First Integration Strategy
pillars.detail: Matou te vave fa'amatalaina konekarate mautu, fa'atagaina le atina'eina tutusa ma le saogalemu tu'ufa'atasia ma faiga fa'apisinisi.

pillars.title: Alualu i Luma Delivery Workflow
pillars.detail: Matou te fa'aaogaina fu'a fa'apitoa, fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, ma faitoto'a lelei e fa'asa'olotoina vave e aunoa ma le fa'aleagaina o le gaosiga.

principles.overview: O a matou fausaga fausaga fa'aiuga fa'amuamua le umi o le ola, fa'agaioiga, ma le manino o le umiaina ina ia tumau pea le fetu'una'i o fa'avae a'o tuputupu a'e pisinisi.

items.title: Tuaoi o Auaunaga Modular
items.detail: O gafatia o lo'o fa'ata'amilomilo i pisinisi pisinisi e fa'atumauina ai le suiga o le a'afiaga i le lotoifale.

items.title: Tu'ufa'atasia o mea na tutupu
items.detail: O lo'o fa'aaogaina le asynchronous workflows pe a iai le fa'apalepale latency e fa'aleleia ai le maufetuuna'i ma fa'aleagaina faiga.

items.title: Matauina e ala i le mamanu
items.detail: O le su'esu'ega, metotia, ma fa'atulagaina ogalaau o lo'o fa'amatalaina muamua e lagolago ai fa'atuatuaina gaioiga ma SLA pulega.

breakdown.title: Mauaina ma le tusiata fale
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'afanua pisinisi fa'amuamua, fa'atapula'aina fa'apitoa, ma fausaga fa'atulagaina a'o le'i amataina le fa'atinoga.
deliverables: Mafutaga faaleaoaoga mo le faatulagaina o oloa ma manaoga
Fofo tusiata fale
Fuafuaga o le tu'uina atu o mea taua

breakdown.title: Fausiaina ma le tu'ufa'atasia
breakdown.summary: O a matou 'au e fa'atinoina foliga autu, tu'ufa'atasia vaega, ma puipuiga lelei i le tutusa.
deliverables: Atina'eina o foliga i sprints iterative
API ma le tu'ufa'atasia o vaega lona tolu
Su'ega otometi ma siaki sauniuni fa'asa'olotoina

breakdown.title: Fa'alauiloaina ma le evolusione
breakdown.summary: A mae'a ona alu-ola, matou te fa'amautuina gaioiga ma fa'amatalaina le isi fa'aleleia atili ta'amilosaga fa'avae i luga o le fa'aaogaina moni.
deliverables: Production rollout runbook
Fa'atinoga ma le fa'atuatuaina
Post-launch roadmap ma le fa'aleleia atili o le backlog

cta.title: Sauni e fausia lau isi talosaga?
cta.description: Tatou mamanuina ma lafoina se fofo e una'ia ai le fuaina o pisinisi taunu'uga.

hero.title: AI, ML ma Pisinisi Atamai

problem.overview: E masani ona aoina e fa'alapotopotoga le tele o fa'amaumauga ae le mafai ona fa'aliliuina i le fa'atuatuaina o fa'amatalaga, fa'agaioiga fa'aiuga, po'o le fuaina o pisinisi gaioiga.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: O le a le mea e masani ona matauina e taitai
painPoints: O le lipoti e eseese i 'au, ma mafua ai le fete'ena'i o tala KPI
O fa'ata'ita'iga o lo'o tumau pea i le fa'ata'ita'iga ma e le o'o lava i le gaosiga o galuega
O fa'afitauli tau fa'amaumauga e fa'aleagaina ai le fa'atuatuaina o auiliiliga ma fa'ata'ita'iga fa'apitoa
impactSignals: O taamilosaga o faaiuga e telegese ona o le finau a le au i le aoga o faamatalaga nai lo le faatinoga
O le sa'o o le valo'aga ma le fuafuaina o lo'o tumau pea le le ogatasi i lea kuata ma lea kuata
Analytics tupe teu fa'afaigaluega fa'aalia maualalo vaetamaina i fafo atu o vaega fa'apitoa auiliili

approach.overview: Matou te tu'uina atu AI ma BI fa'avae e pei o gaosiga faiga, fa'apipi'i fa'amaumauga inisinia, fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga fa'agaioiga, ma fa'aiuga workflow tu'ufa'atasia.

pillars.title: Fa'avae o Oloa Fa'amaumauga
pillars.detail: O fa'amaumauga fa'amaumauga e fa'amautuina ai le toe fa'aaogaina, pulea, ma maualuga-lelei sao mo analytics ma ML.

pillars.title: MLOps Lifecycle Automation
pillars.detail: Aoaoga, fa'aaogaina, mata'ituina, ma le fa'atonutonuina o le tafetafea e otometi e fa'atuatuaina ai fa'ata'ita'iga i le gaosiga.

pillars.title: Fa'aiuga Workflow Tu'ufa'atasia
pillars.detail: O malamalamaaga o lo'o fa'apipi'iina i totonu o mea faigaluega fa'agaioiga ma dashboards ina ia galulue ai 'au i luga o le atamai i totonu o gaioiga i aso uma.

principles.overview: O la matou AI / BI fausaga e fa'amuamua fa'amatalaga fa'atuatuaina, fa'ata'ita'iga fa'amatalaina, ma fa'atonutonuina avanoa fa'ata'ita'iga i le atina'e atoa.

items.title: Fa'auigaga Metric Tasi
items.detail: Critical KPIs o lo'o fa'amatalaina fa'atasi e ala i fa'ata'ita'iga semantic fefa'asoaa'i e fa'aumatia ai le fete'ena'i o lipoti.

items.title: Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'atuatuaina Fa
items.detail: Faatinoga tapulaa, tafetafea mauaina, ma rollback auala puipuia faaiuga lelei i le gaosiga.

items.title: Saogalemu ma Pulega e ala i le Mamanu
items.detail: O fa'amaumauga o fa'amatalaga, matafaioi-fa'avae avanoa, ma su'ega-sauni fa'atonutonu o lo'o fa'apipi'iina i paipa uma.

capabilities: Fofo o Fale Teuoloa o Fa'amaumauga

breakdown.title: Fa'avae Fa'amaumauga
breakdown.summary: Matou te su'esu'eina punaoa, fa'amatalaina konekarate fa'amatalaga, ma fa'atuina pulega ina ia amata fa'ata'ita'iga uma i fa'amatalaga fa'atuatuaina.

Inisinia fa'apitoa ma fuafuaga fa'atulagaina
Puipuiga ma pulega fa'avae

Dashboard fa'apitoa ma lipoti fa'agaioiga
Tuufaatasiga o le workflow o faaiuga

breakdown.title: MLOps ma vaetamaina
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'agaioia le fa'aaogaina, mata'ituina, ma le fa'amalosia o le 'au e fa'atuatuaina ai i'uga i le aluga o taimi.
deliverables: Otometi fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita
Fa'asolosologa, sa'o, ma le mata'ituina o le fa'aaogaina
O le tu'uina atu o le 'au ma le fa'agaioiga o le tusi ta'aloga

cta.title: Fa'aliliu au fa'amatalaga i se malamalamaaga
cta.description: Liliu fa'amaumauga vaevaeina i le manino ma le fa'atinoina o le atamai.

hero.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
hero.description: Multi-cloud platform, maufetuuna'i fausaga, ma scalable atina'e fuafuaina mo le tuputupu a'e umi.

problem.title: Fa'afitauli Fa'afitauli Fa'apisinisi
problem.subtitle: Aisea e taofia ai taumafaiga i le ao ina ua mae'a le galu muamua o femalagaaiga

approach.title: Auala Inisinia
approach.subtitle: Fa'afefea ona matou fausiaina le saogalemu, scalable cloud platform ma le fa'atonutonuina o femalagaaiga lamatiaga

principles.title: Mataupu Faavae o le Fausaga
principles.subtitle: Fa'avae fa'aiuga e fa'apaleni agility, maufetuuna'i, ma pulega

capabilities.title: Auaunaga i le Ao
capabilities.subtitle: Fausiaina, fausiaina, ma fa'ateleina i le ao

breakdown.title: Solia o le Auaunaga
breakdown.subtitle: O se fa'asologa manino mo le fuafuaina, femalagaa'i, ma le fa'agaioia o ao fa'avae

problem.overview: O le tele o fa'alapotopotoga e fa'amae'aina ulua'i femalagaiga i le ao ae o lo'o fa'agaioia pea e pei o 'au i luga o le 'upega tafa'ilagi, ma le le lelei o le va'aia, le ogatasi o fa'atonutonuga, ma le fa'ateleina o tupe fa'aalu.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: O le a le mea e masani ona matauina e taitai
painPoints: O galuega e femalagaa'i e aunoa ma le saogalemu masani ma feso'ota'iga fa'atonutonu
O tau o le ao e fa'ateleina vave nai lo le tau o pisinisi na tu'uina atu
O le tu'uina atu o le siosiomaga o lo'o tumau pea le tusi lesona ma le le ogatasi i 'au
impactSignals: O fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i e mafua mai i le fa'atulagaina o le si'osi'omaga
Ua faaitiitia le sauniuniga o le suegatusi ona o faiga faalepulega ua vaevaeina
Atina'e ta'imua taimi fa'atuai oloa ma fa'amaumauga taumafaiga

approach.overview: Matou te mamanuina ao fa'avae e pei o oloa, fa'aaogaina atina'e otometi, faiga fa'avae puipuiga, ma femalagaa'iga galu ogatasi ma pisinisi fa'alavelave.

pillars.title: Landing Zone as Code
pillars.detail: O le fa'asinomaga, feso'ota'iga, saogalemu, ma faiga fa'avae o lo'o fa'atulagaina mo le toe fa'aauau ma le su'etusi.

pillars.title: Wave-Based Migration Strategy
pillars.detail: O galuega e fa'asolosolo i vaega fa'atonutonu ma le fa'alagolago-iloa fa'asologa ma le sauniuniga o le toe fa'aleleia.

pillars.title: SRE + FinOps Fa'agaioiga Matasele
pillars.detail: O fa'ailoga fa'atuatuaina ma iunite-tamaoaiga o lo'o iloiloina fa'atasi e fa'aleleia atili ai le taimi ma le fa'aalu lelei.

principles.overview: O la matou fausaga fa'ata'ita'iga e fiafia i le fa'alauiloaina o atina'e, la'ititi avanoa avanoa, ma composable tulaga e lagolagoina le vave tu'uina atu o oloa.

items.title: Mamanu o Atina'e Tetele e le mafai ona suia
items.detail: Siosiomaga ua toe fausia mai versioned code e faaitiitia ai le tafetafea ma faafaigofie le toe faaleleia faagaoioia.

items.title: Security Baseline e ala i le faaletonu
items.detail: Zero-trust avanoa fa'atonutonu ma faiga fa'avae fa'amalosia o lo'o fa'apipi'iina i so'o se siosiomaga olaga.

items.title: Resilience e ala i le Tufatufaina
items.detail: O galuega taua ua fuafuaina mo le tele-sone po'o le tele-itulagi toilalo fa'apalepale pe a mana'omia ai le a'afiaga o pisinisi.

breakdown.title: Fausaga ma Tulaueleele Sone
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'amatalaina le tulaga fa'atatau, puipuiga, ma tulaga fa'avae a'o le'i minoi galuega.

Fa'asinomaga, feso'ota'iga, ma le saogalemu fa'avae
Tau ma le tausisia o puipuiga

breakdown.title: Femalagaaiga ma Fausiaina o Fausaga

Fa'atulagaina o le koneteina ma le serverless platform
Atina'e e pei o le Code modules

breakdown.title: Fa'atuatuaina ma FinOps

deliverables: SLOs, mata'ituina, ma fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i
Fa'amaoniga o le toe fa'aleleia ma le toe fa'aleleia o fa'alavelave fa'
Cost optimization backlog and governance cadence

problem.impactSignalsTitle: O le a le mea e masani ona matauina e taitai
painPoints: O fa'auigaga o paipa e eseese i le 'au, fausiaina faitoto'a lelei e le ogatasi
Fa'amaonia o le fa'apipi'iina o tusi lesona e fa'atuai ai le hotfix ma le fa'asa'olotoina o fa'asologa
O fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i e toe tupu ona o le telemetry e le mae'a pe siloed
impactSignals: O lo'o fa'aauau pea ona fa'ateleina le taimi mo suiga e ui lava i tupe fa'aalu otometi
Suiga o le toilalo fua faatatau spikes i le taimi o le maualuga o le faaooina atu
Developer productivity pa'u ona o tooling fete'ena'iga ma fesuia'iga fa'amatalaga

principles.overview: O la matou DevOps fausaga e fa'afetaui le saoasaoa o le tu'uina atu ma le pulega e ala i le fa'aautomatika o le fa'atonutonuina ma le fa'aititia o galuega fa'agaioiga e tasi.

painPoints: O fa'afanua o suiga e fa'amatalaina ae le fa'aliliuina i le pulega o le tu'uina atu
Pisinisi ma inisinia fa'amuamua eseese pe a mae'a ulua'i fuafuaga ta'amilosaga
O fa'ata'ita'iga fa'agaioiga o lo'o poloka ai le vaetamaina o faiga fa'aonapo nei o le tu'
impactSignals: Polokalame fa'aalu si'itia ae o lo'o tumau pea le fa'ata'ita'iga o le KPI
O taumafaiga e misia le tu'uina atu i le va o fuafuaga, fausaga ma le fa'atinoina
O 'au e o'o i le vaivai o suiga ma le fa'atapula'aina o le taua o pisinisi

approach.overview: Matou te tu'ufa'atasia faufautua fa'ata'ita'i ma le tu'uina atu o fausaga, fa'atulagaina fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, tulaga gafatia, ma fa'atinoina cadence faataamilo fuaina sini.

pillars.title: Faamuamua o le Vaitafe o le Tulaga Faatauaina
pillars.detail: Matou te fa'asologa taumafaiga e fa'avae i luga o le fuaina o pisinisi a'afiaga ma fa'alagolago fa'apitoa.

pillars.title: Target Operating Model Design
pillars.detail: Matafaioi, pulega, ma aia tatau fa'aiuga ua fa'amatalaina e lagolago ai le vave fa'atinoina i pisinisi ma tekonolosi 'au.

pillars.title: Pulega o le Tuuina atu o Portfolio
pillars.detail: O le alualu i luma o le suiga o lo'o fa'atautaia e ala i le KPI-feso'ota'i siaki ma fa'atonutonu tulaga lamatia.

principles.overview: O la matou suiga fausaga e fa'amamafaina ai le fa'ateleina o fa'aonaponei ma le manino o le tali atu, aloese mai le fa'alavelave fa'alavelave e aunoa ma le fa'amaoniga o pisinisi.

items.title: Fa'atulagaina o Pisinisi Gafatia
items.detail: O suiga o tekonolosi o lo'o fa'atulagaina faataamilo i agava'a e fa'afanua sa'o i tupe maua, lelei o auaunaga, po'o le tau lelei.

items.title: Composable Platform Strategy
items.detail: O vaega o le tulaga ua filifilia mo interoperability e lagolago ai le femalagaa'i ma le vave fetu'una'i.

items.title: Pulega ma Delivery Cadence
items.detail: O fa'aiuga fa'aiuga ma fa'atonutonu manatu o lo'o fa'apipi'iina i sprint ma kuata ta'amilosaga, e le o togafitia o ni auala tu'ufa'atasia.

breakdown.title: Fa'atulagaina o Fuafuaga
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'afeso'ota'i fa'amuamua ta'ita'i ma fa'afuainumera fa'afuainumera e fausia ai se fefa'asoaa'i suiga fa'atonuga
deliverables: Suiga sini ma tulaga manuia
Agava'a matua ma avanoa iloiloga
Fa'amuamua taumafaiga fa'amuamua

breakdown.title: Fuafuaga o le Fa'atinoina
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'amatalaina le fa'ata'ita'iga fa'agaioiga, fausaga fausaga, ma le fa'asologa o fa'atinoga.
deliverables: Fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga ma pulega mamanu
Tekonolosi ma fausaga fausaga tulaga faatonuina
Fa'asolosolo fa'atinoina fa'afanua

breakdown.title: Suiga ma Taua Fa'ataunu'uina
breakdown.summary: Matou te una'ia le vaetamaina, siaki le gaioiga o le KPI, ma fa'alelei taumafaiga e fa'avae i luga o taunu'uga o le tu'uina atu.
deliverables: Vaetamaina ma fa'amalosia fuafuaga
KPI fua cadence
Backlog optimization faalekuata

cta.title: Amata lau malaga suiga
cta.description: Fa'atautaia suiga ma fa'amuamua manino ma fuafuaga fa'apitoa e tu'uina atu ai.

hero.title: IoT ma Edge Computing
hero.description: Feso'ota'i faiga mai masini i ao, fa'atasi ai ma telemetry pipelines ma pito atamai mo alamanuia fua.

problem.title: Fa'afitauli Fa'afitauli Fa'apisinisi
problem.subtitle: Aisea e le mafai ai e polokalame feso'ota'i masini ona fua i tua atu o pailate fa'asalalauga

approach.title: Auala Inisinia
approach.subtitle: Fa'afefea ona matou mamanuina le saogalemu, fa'agaioia IoT system mai masini firmware i ao API

principles.title: Mataupu Faavae o le Fausaga
principles.subtitle: Edge-to-cloud design tulafono mo le fa'atuatuaina, latency, ma le pulega o va'a

capabilities.title: IoT Solutions
capabilities.subtitle: Fa'afeso'ota'i, mata'ituina, ma fa'alelei au masini

breakdown.title: Solia o le Auaunaga
breakdown.subtitle: Fa'afefea ona matou tu'uina atu feso'ota'iga feso'ota'iga mai masini pito i le ao atamai

problem.overview: O taumafaiga a le IoT e masani ona fa'amaonia ai le agava'a fa'apitoa i pailate ae le manuia i le fua ona o le le fa'atuatuaina feso'ota'iga, vaivai va'a fa'atonutonu, ma le le lelei tu'ufa'atasia ma pisinisi workflows.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: O le a le mea e masani ona matauina e taitai
painPoints: Masini onboarding ma lifecycle pulega tumau tusi lesona ma mea sese-faigofie
Telemetry pipeline maua pisapisao, le mae'a, pe tuai fa'agaioiga fa'amaumauga
Fa'atonuga mamao ma fa'afouga firmware fa'alauiloaina le saogalemu ma le saogalemu lamatiaga
impactSignals: O siosiomaga pailate e manuia, ae o le gaosiga o taimi e masani ona se'e
Field operations teams tali atu i mea na tutupu e aunoa ma le va'aia va'aia
Pisinisi faiga e le mafai ona fa'atuatuaina fa'aaogaina masini atamai i le taimi moni

approach.overview: Matou te fausiaina IoT fa'avae e pei o fa'atonutonuina tufatufaina faiga, tu'ufa'atasia saogalemu pito runtime tulaga faatonuina, mea na tutupu-tulia ingestion, ma fa'agaioiga pulega i va'a fua.

pillars.title: Saogalemu Masini Lifecycle Management
pillars.detail: Sauniuniga, fa'asinomaga, ki feauaua'i, ma firmware fa'afouga e otometi e fa'aititia ai le fa'agaioiga lamatiaga.

pillars.title: Fausaga Telemetry Mea na Tutupu
pillars.detail: O paipa tafe e fa'amasani ai, fa'amaonia, ma fa'atautaia mea na tutupu i masini mo auiliiliga ma fa'atonutonu i le latalata i le taimi moni.

pillars.title: Vaalele Fa'atonutonu Fa'agaioiga Va'alele
pillars.detail: Mataituina, mataala, ma fa'atonuga mamao e maua ai le va'ava'aia fa'atuatuaina i aseta tufatufaina.

principles.overview: O la matou fausaga IoT e fa'apaleni ai fa'aiuga maualalo-latency ma pulega tutotonu, mata'ituina, ma le saogalemu tausisia.

items.title: Edge Autonomy ma Cloud Coordination
items.detail: O fa'agaioiga taua i le lotoifale e fa'aauau pea i le taimi o le fa'aleagaina o feso'ota'iga a'o fa'afeso'ota'i le setete i le ao pe a maua.

items.title: Konekarate Event Schemas
items.detail: Masini ma fa'avae 'au fa'aaogaina fa'atonutonu schemas e fa'asaoina telemetry tumau i lomiga.

items.title: Zero-Trust Device Security
items.detail: O le fa'amaoniga fa'atasi, la'ititi avanoa, ma felauaiga fa'ailogaina o lo'o fa'amalosia i fegalegaleaiga uma o masini.

breakdown.title: Masini ma Edge Strategy
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'amatalaina feso'ota'iga feso'ota'iga, pito runtime tulaga fa'atulagaina, ma saogalemu tu'uina atu mo fanua masini.
deliverables: Masini onboarding ma feso'ota'iga fa'ata'ita'iga
Edge runtime ma le fa'aaogaina o le blueprint
Fa'avae o le saogalemu o va'a

breakdown.title: Telemetry ma Vaalele Fa'atonutonu
breakdown.summary: Matou te fausiaina paipa e pu'eina mea na tutupu, fa'ata'ita'i masaga numera, ma mafai ai ona fa'atonutonu mamao workflows.
deliverables: Fa'ata'ita'iga o le fa'ata'ita'iga ma le fa'ata'ita'iga o mea na tutupu
Digital twin ma aseta fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga fa'atinoina
Fa'atonuga ma le fa'atonutonuina o le API Layer

breakdown.title: Fa'agaioiga ma fua
breakdown.summary: Matou te fa'agaioia le pulega o va'a ma le fa'atuatuaina o le fa'atonutonuina mo le gaosiga-fua IoT siosiomaga.
deliverables: Mataituina ma le mataala o vaa masini
Fa'amatalaga
Fuafuaga o le Rollout ma le Lifecycle Support Plan

cta.title: Fa'afeso'ota'i au masini
cta.description: Fausia ni fofo IoT fa'atuatuaina ua sauni mo siosiomaga gaosiga moni.
